reviews.review_description: The Dyson Demo VR experience is an experience like no other. Captivating story like it comes straight from a movie. The voice acting is unbelievable and outstanding! Truly a captivating experience and an absolute MUST for Quest 2 owners.

I hope more experiences like this will follow suit, maybe someday it could be the future of shopping.

It would be nice to have an option to disable video audioplay when changing the product you want to try out.
highly detailed, just amazing! would love to see more dyson procuts including vacuums!

A tech demo to play with hair dryers, straighteners and all sorts of Dyson made hair products I have no idea about. There is some hair to use them with that has great physics. This might be a glorified advertisement but I thought it was well made and worth a laugh for 5 mins, and since its free there is no harm trying it out for yourself. 

Featured in Oculus Quest Seated Games Video - https://youtu.be/Naxha7wgbDQ
Not very useful but had me play around for 15 minutes.
It’s cool how you get to experience the dyson products! Love it!
Works great! Fun to try out the new products

reviews.review_title: try it and you'll see why it't 5*
reviews.review_description: try it and you'll see why it't 5*
